subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Be thou in the utmost state of joy and exultation, and render thanksgiving unto the Forgiving Lord, for praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در نهایت وجد و سرور باش و بشکرانه رب غفور پرداز که الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
